title: Sesame Drizzled Mediterranean Avocado Salad
description: This quick-fix paleo-friendly mediterranean dish combines the freshness of avocado with a touch of sesame oil for a unique twist on a traditional salad.

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: finely chopped for a slight crunch

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: used in air frying if desired

instructions: Slice the avocado into rounds and remove the pit, then mash with a fork to desired consistency.
In a large bowl, combine mashed avocado, cherry tomatoes, cucumber slices, crumbled feta cheese, red onion, parsley, and fresh lemon juice. Mix well.
Drizzle sesame seed oil over the salad mixture and toss gently until all ingredients are evenly coated. Let sit for at least 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Before serving, drizzle additional sesame seed oil on top as desired. Garnish with extra parsley if needed.
